name: PGS-series Programmable Servos
description: Sanwa PGS programmable drift/touring servos. No PC software - set with the Multi Setting Gear unit or wirelessly from an SSL transmitter.
notes: Hardware-only device: no downloadable PC configuration software. Sanwa publishes no PC software for any product - the site has no software or download section at all, and transmitter firmware ships as a microSD payload linked from one-off news pages. The Multi Setting Gear manual is linked here because the description names that unit as the configuration path.
